rulings.Case Title: JAMES E. HIRSCH, TRUSTEE OF THE HIRSCH FAMILY et al VS. MARIA STACHO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Entry Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 23, 2011, line 1. Plaintiff James E. Hirsch, Trustee of the Hirsch Family's Motion for Entry of Judgment. Grant entry of judgment in the amount of $32,937.38. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AURORA LOAN SERVICES LLC, VS. TITO ZAPAGAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 23, 2011, line 2. Defendant Tito Zapagan's demurrer to complaint. Sustained without leave to amend. Notice fatally defective, lacks phone number to contact plaintiff. C.C.P. 1161(2). = (501/REQ)
